body.thing: igor test suite has no orphaned importer of the retired seed_layer templates
body.intention: No test module imports a claudecode.seed_layer* module (retired in 3fcfd070), so the igor layer3/4 suite collects without ModuleNotFoundError

red_run.summary:
def test_no_test_imports_retired_seed_layer_module():
        offenders: list[str] = []
        for py in _TESTS_ROOT.rglob("*.py"):
            if py.resolve() == _SELF:
                continue  # this guard names the pattern; don't flag itself
            text = py.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
            if _RETIRED.search(text):
                offenders.append(str(py.relative_to(_TESTS_ROOT.parent)))
    
>       assert not offenders, (
            "Test modules import retired claudecode.seed_layer* modules "
            f"(deleted in 3fcfd070) and will error at collection: {sorted(offenders)}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test modules import retired claudecode.seed_layer* modules (deleted in 3fcfd070) and will error at collection: ['tests/igor/test_layer3_constrain.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_decompose.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_hypothesize.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_observe.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_parse_goal.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_replan.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_scope_check.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_situate.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer4_nodes.py']
E       assert not ['tests/igor/test_layer4_nodes.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_observe.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_decompose.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_scope_check.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_replan.py', 'tests/igor/test_layer3_hypothesize.py', ...]

tests/igor/test_no_orphaned_seed_layer_imports.py:40: AssertionError
=========================== short test summary info ============================

body.why: Nine tests importing the deleted seed templates errored at collection, silently disabling their own runs; the guard makes a future retire-without-tests fail loudly instead of rotting.
